_readme: 타임스탬프 whisper 단어 실측 (파이프라인 v6 기본)
title: losing her marbles

sentences.en: Wait a minute here! What do you mean the party's today? His birthday's not 'til next week!
sentences.ko: 잠깐만! 파티가 오늘이라니 무슨 소리야? 생일은 다음 주잖아!

sentences.en: ★ What's goin' on down there? Is his mom losin' her marbles?
sentences.ko: ★ 아래층에 무슨 일이래? 걔네 엄마 정신이 나갔나?

sentences.en: Well, obviously she wanted to have the party before the move.
sentences.ko: 뭐, 당연히 이사 전에 파티를 하고 싶으셨겠지.
